articles.title: Meta is reportedly laying off up to 20 percent of its staff
articles.summary: Meta is planning massive layoffs that could eliminate roughly 15,800 positions, affecting up to 20% of its workforce. The cuts are intended to offset spending on AI infrastructure and data centers. This would be the largest round of layoffs since the company terminated 22,000 workers in 2022-2023.

articles.title: Trump administration is allegedly collecting $10 billion on the TikTok deal
articles.summary: The Trump administration is reportedly collecting $10 billion in fees from the TikTok deal brokered with Oracle and Silver Lake. Sources indicate $2.5 billion was already paid to the Treasury when the deal closed on January 22nd. The remaining amount will be paid in installments by the new investors.

articles.title: US Army announces contract with Anduril worth up to $20B
articles.summary: The US Army has awarded Anduril a massive contract worth up to $20 billion. The Army described this as a single enterprise contract that consolidates more than 120 separate procurement actions.

articles.title: The $100,000 fee for H-1Bs is causing all sorts of problems
articles.summary: President Trump's executive order raising H-1B visa fees to $100,000 has caused significant disruption in the tech industry. Thousands of workers were stranded abroad when trying to renew visas, with details about impacts only emerging after implementation. The new H-1B registration season has begun amid continued uncertainty.

articles.title: MacBook Air M5 review: a small update for the 'just right' Mac
articles.summary: The 2026 MacBook Air features incremental updates including the M5 chip, Wi-Fi 7, and faster storage starting at 512GB. While it remains an outstanding computer, it's now $100 more expensive than the previous model. The new MacBook Neo offers a more affordable alternative at $500 less than the base Air.

articles.title: Samsung's Galaxy Buds 4 Pro are the choice — if you have a Galaxy phone
articles.summary: Samsung's $249.99 Galaxy Buds 4 Pro offer upgraded woofers, improved hi-fi sound, better noise cancellation, and clearer calls. While they're a nice improvement over the Buds 3, they still require a Galaxy device to access all features. The update isn't a huge leap forward but refines what worked well in the previous model.

articles.title: The fast rise and epic fall of Clubhouse
articles.summary: Clubhouse was once seen as the next big thing in social media, betting that audio would be the future of social networking. The app grew rapidly in 2020-2021 and became hugely influential among tech circles. However, it ultimately failed to sustain its momentum and fell from prominence as quickly as it rose.

articles.title: My fireside chat about agentic engineering at the Pragmatic Summit
articles.summary: Simon Willison participated in a fireside chat discussing agentic engineering at the Pragmatic Summit. The discussion covered topics related to AI agents and their engineering applications.
